front: What are best practices for organizing GCS object paths to optimize analytics query performance?
back: Use a Hive-compatible partitioning scheme in object paths (e.g., gs://bucket/events/date=2024-03-01/hour=14/) so tools like BigQuery external tables, Dataproc Hive, and Dataflow auto-detect and prune partitions. Avoid too many small files (use compaction to produce files of 100MB to 1GB). Prefix with low-cardinality keys first for better listing performance. Gotcha: random UUIDs or timestamps as prefixes cause hotspots in GCS listing; use meaningful partitions instead.
